all.en: This memo summarizes the updated expense reimbursement policy.
all.zh: 本備忘錄整理最新的差旅費請款辦法。

all.en: The policy applies to all full time and contract employees.
all.zh: 本辦法適用於所有正職與約聘員工。

all.en: Reimbursable expenses must be related to approved business activities.
all.zh: 可請款費用須與經核准之業務活動相關。

all.en: Travel, lodging, meals, and ground transportation are covered categories.
all.zh: 差旅、住宿、餐費與地面交通屬於可請款項目。

all.en: All claims must be submitted within thirty days of the trip.
all.zh: 所有請款須於行程結束後三十天內提出。

all.en: Receipts are required for any expense above twenty five dollars.
all.zh: 凡單筆超過二十五美元的費用皆需檢附收據。

all.en: Digital scans of receipts are accepted through the finance portal.
all.zh: 可透過財務系統上傳收據之電子掃描檔。

all.en: Meal expenses are capped at seventy dollars per day domestically.
all.zh: 國內出差餐費每日上限為七十美元。

all.en: International meal allowances follow the rates published quarterly.
all.zh: 國際出差餐費依每季公告之標準辦理。

all.en: Economy class flights are required for travel under six hours.
all.zh: 飛行時間六小時以內須搭乘經濟艙。

all.en: Premium economy may be booked for flights longer than six hours.
all.zh: 飛行時間超過六小時可訂購豪華經濟艙。

all.en: Hotel rates should remain within published city tier limits.
all.zh: 住宿費用應控制於公告之城市分級上限內。

all.en: Ride sharing services are preferred over rental cars when possible.
all.zh: 可行時應優先使用共乘服務而非租車。

all.en: Personal expenses charged to the corporate card must be flagged.
all.zh: 以公司卡支付之個人費用須另行標註。

all.en: Alcohol is reimbursable only during approved client entertainment.
all.zh: 酒類僅於經核准之客戶招待中可請款。

all.en: Spousal travel costs are not reimbursable under any circumstance.
all.zh: 配偶差旅費用於任何情況下均不予補助。

all.en: Mileage for personal vehicle use follows the standard federal rate.
all.zh: 使用私人車輛之里程依聯邦標準費率核發。

all.en: Claims missing approval signatures will be returned for correction.
all.zh: 缺少核准簽章之請款單將退回補正。

all.en: Repeated policy violations may result in disciplinary review.
all.zh: 重複違反辦法者可能進入懲處審議程序。

all.en: Finance will reimburse approved claims within ten business days.
all.zh: 財務部將於十個營業日內撥付核准之請款。

all.en: Direct questions about specific cases to the travel desk team.
all.zh: 個案疑問請逕洽差旅服務窗口團隊。

all.en: The complete policy document is available on the intranet portal.
all.zh: 完整辦法文件可於內部入口網站查閱。

all.en: Please review the updated rules before booking your next trip.
all.zh: 請於規劃下次行程前先閱讀最新規範。

all.en: Cash advances may be requested for trips lasting longer than two weeks.
all.zh: 出差超過兩週者可申請預支現金。

all.en: Unused advance funds must be returned to finance within five business days.
all.zh: 未使用之預支款項應於五個營業日內繳回財務部。

all.en: Conference registration fees are reimbursed separately under the professional development budget.
all.zh: 研討會報名費另由專業發展預算項下核銷。

all.en: Team building dinners require pre approval from the relevant department head.
all.zh: 團隊聚餐須事先取得所屬部門主管核准。

all.en: Currency conversions should use the rate posted on the day of payment.
all.zh: 匯率換算應採用付款當日公告之牌價。

all.en: Lost receipt declarations are limited to two occurrences per fiscal year.
all.zh: 遺失收據聲明於每會計年度最多受理兩次。

all.en: Employees retain copies of submitted claims for a minimum of seven years.
all.zh: 員工須保存所提請款副本至少七年。

all.en: Quarterly audits review a random selection of completed reimbursement reports.
all.zh: 每季稽核將隨機抽查已完成之請款報告。

all.en: Policy updates take effect on the first day of the following fiscal quarter.
all.zh: 辦法修訂自下一會計季首日起生效。

all.en: Training sessions on the new system run every Friday in the finance auditorium.
all.zh: 新系統訓練課程每週五於財務部會議廳舉辦。

all.en: Mobile receipt capture allows employees to submit expenses while still traveling.
all.zh: 行動收據擷取功能讓員工於出差期間即可提交費用。

all.en: Corporate card statements are reconciled automatically with submitted expense reports each month.
all.zh: 公司卡帳單每月與已提交之費用報告自動勾稽核對。

all.en: Per diem rates apply for travel to locations without detailed meal allowance tables.
all.zh: 於缺乏詳細餐費標準之地點出差時適用每日津貼費率。

all.en: Group meal expenses require an attendee list submitted with each claim form.
all.zh: 團體用餐費用須隨每份請款單檢附出席人員名單。

all.en: Tips and gratuities are reimbursable up to twenty percent of the meal subtotal.
all.zh: 小費可於餐費小計之百分之二十以內請款。

all.en: Internet and phone charges incurred for work during travel are fully reimbursable.
all.zh: 出差期間因工作所產生之網路與電話費用可全額請款。

all.en: Baggage fees for the first checked bag are covered on all qualifying trips.
all.zh: 所有符合資格之行程中第一件託運行李費用皆予補助。

all.en: Travel insurance purchased through the corporate portal is reimbursable without additional approval.
all.zh: 透過公司平台購買之旅遊保險可直接請款無須額外核准。

all.en: Employees should book travel at least fourteen days in advance whenever possible.
all.zh: 員工應盡可能於行程開始前至少十四天預訂差旅。

all.en: Annual policy compliance training is mandatory for all staff who travel regularly.
all.zh: 年度政策遵循訓練對所有經常出差之員工皆屬必要。

all.en: Honestly, I always snap a photo of my receipt the moment I leave the restaurant so I don't lose it.
all.zh: 老實說我每次離開餐廳那一刻就會立刻拍下收據，免得後來不見。

all.en: My colleague forgot to flag a personal Uber charge once and finance gave her three days to fix it.
all.zh: 有次同事漏掉標註私人 Uber 費用，財務給了她三天時間補上。

all.en: Don't bother trying to expense a fancy bottle of wine, the system will flag it within minutes.
all.zh: 別想著報銷高級紅酒，系統幾分鐘內就會標出來。

all.en: I always book my hotel through the corporate portal even when third party sites look slightly cheaper.
all.zh: 我都用公司平台訂飯店，就算第三方網站看起來便宜一點點也一樣。

all.en: The mobile receipt capture saved me on my last trip when I lost half my paper receipts at the airport.
all.zh: 上次出差我在機場掉了一半的紙本收據，多虧行動收據擷取救了我。

all.en: Honestly, the per diem option is way less hassle than tracking every coffee and snack receipt.
all.zh: 老實說每日津貼方案比追蹤每杯咖啡跟每包零食的收據省事多了。

all.en: Be sure to email the travel desk the moment your trip extends, otherwise the claim gets messy.
all.zh: 行程一延長就立刻寄信給差旅窗口，不然請款會搞得一團亂。

all.en: I once split a group dinner bill onto separate cards and finance still wanted the original attendee list.
all.zh: 有次團體晚餐我用幾張卡分開結帳，財務還是要原始的出席名單。

all.en: Don't argue with finance about the meal cap, just have the next dinner somewhere a little more affordable.
all.zh: 別跟財務爭論餐費上限，下次晚餐選便宜一點的地方就好。

all.en: Honestly, booking flights two weeks early not only saves money but also reduces the morning stress significantly.
all.zh: 老實說提早兩週訂機票不僅省錢，還大幅降低當天早上的緊張感。
